meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master User Onboarding to Finish Your First SaaS Project
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning projects. Learn how to implement professional user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to finish your first real-world app today.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is a lack of user-focused momentum. By implementing a structured onboarding flow, you force clarity on your product's core value proposition. Use Antigravity to scaffold your architecture and Claude Code to iterate rapidly, turning your 'in-progress' code into a functional, finished application.
content.intro:
Your GitHub profile is a graveyard of half-baked repositories. You start with high-octane energy, but somewhere between the database schema and the authentication logic, the friction of 'unfinished work' kills your momentum. You aren't failing because you lack talent; you are failing because you lack a framework that forces your project to a logical, usable conclusion.

User onboarding is the ultimate forcing function. It requires you to define exactly what your user does the moment they land on your page. When you build the onboarding first, you stop coding aimless features and start building a narrative. Let's shift from endless tinkering to shipping your first production-ready milestone.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the one action that proves your app delivers value. We will map this to a 3-step onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project idea and propose a 3-step onboarding flow that guides the user to the core 'Aha!' moment in under 60 seconds.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a user journey map for the onboarding flow based on the Antigravity output.'

steps.title: Architect the Onboarding State Machine
steps.description: Use a state machine to track onboarding progress so users never get lost in the UI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React state machine configuration using XState to manage a 3-step onboarding process with persistence.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Implement the onboarding state machine in src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts'

steps.title: Build the Progressive Profile UI
steps.description: Build high-conversion forms that capture just enough data to initialize the user's workspace.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive, clean React component for a multi-step onboarding form with validation and progress tracking.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Build OnboardingForm.tsx using Tailwind CSS and the state machine hooks created previously.'

steps.title: Automate Post-Onboarding Triggers
steps.description: Trigger a backend action (like database seeding or API calls) immediately upon onboarding completion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Supabase edge function or API route that triggers once the user completes the final step of the onboarding flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create server-side logic to initialize user data after onboarding completion.'

steps.title: Validate and Deploy
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a dry run of the onboarding flow and fix edge-case state bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a QA engineer. Review the onboarding flow code and identify any potential dead-ends or state-sync errors.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Run integration tests for the onboarding flow and fix any errors found.'

pro_tips: Never ask for email sign-up before showing value; use 'anonymous-first' onboarding.
Use optimistic UI updates to make your onboarding feel instantaneous, even if the backend is slow.
Add a 'Skip' button to every step—if users want to skip, your onboarding is likely too long.
Track the drop-off rate at each step; if 50% leave at step 2, that step is your primary friction point.
Always provide a 'reset' button in the settings menu so users can re-trigger onboarding if they get confused.
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, deploy your project to Vercel and share the link in our community Slack channel for a peer code review.
content.conversion_block: You are closer to shipping than you think. By focusing on the user's first sixty seconds, you unlock the discipline needed to finish the rest of the application. Stop the cycle of unfinished projects and claim your place as a developer who delivers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
